---
title: "cohort_fn"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd) | [View source](https://codeberg.org/usrbinr/ti/src/branch/main/R/abc.R#L223)

# `cohort_fn()`

Internal function for the cohort segment object

## Usage

```r
cohort_fn(x)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `x` | segment object |

## Value

function
